subject: vocabulary
title: Hyphenated Words
instruction:
Use a hyphen to combine one of the words in box A with one of the words in box B. Then complete the sentences.

Box A: double | long | short | one
Box B: edged | sighted | sided | term

questions.text: We need a ___ plan for our transport systems that will take into account future growth.
A warning sign was put at the site of the accident as a ___ measure until a new wall was built.
This argument appears to be a little ___. I'd like to hear the other side as well.
The management agreed to employ five more members of staff, which in hindsight was a very ___ decision because within a few weeks we were still understaffed.
Globalisation is a ___ sword. It promotes multiculturalism while it erodes the local culture.
